welcome.subject: Welcome to {{community}}!
welcome.body: Thank you for joining {{community}}. Your account has been created and you can now start exploring the platform.

verification.subject: Verify your email address
verification.body: Please verify your email address by clicking the button below.

password_reset.subject: Reset your password
password_reset.body: You requested a password reset. Click the button below to set a new password.
password_reset.ignore: If you did not request this, you can safely ignore this email.

review_request.subject: Leave a review for {{name}}
review_request.body: You recently exchanged services with {{other_party}}. Please take a moment to leave a review.

footer.sent_by: Sent by {{community}} powered by Project NEXUS
